technical_summary: Pose-assisted freestyle analysis processed 54 sampled frames and detected usable body landmarks in 40 frames (74% detection rate). Draft findings flagged for coach review: Body Line Needs Coach Review. These are evidence prompts, not automatic conclusions.

findings.why_it_matters: A lower hip line can increase resistance and make the catch less effective.
